query:
SELECT c.id, c.name, c.avg_score, c.total_reviews, 
       (SELECT AVG(rating) FROM contractor_reviews WHERE contractor_id = c.id) as calculated_avg
FROM contractors c 
WHERE c.id = 30001;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user qcNV4qQD7qpkaJ4.fb5a500c82ee --database APFRAaBLqYVeRNQZ9fu2LF --execute SELECT c.id, c.name, c.avg_score, c.total_reviews, 
       (SELECT AVG(rating) FROM contractor_reviews WHERE contractor_id = c.id) as calculated_avg
FROM contractors c 
WHERE c.id = 30001;
